CustomField.description: If checked, external users have the option to complete a booking without making a payment. The label for this option is set in the "Tour Book No Payment Label (External)" Custom Label.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: If checked, external users have the option to complete a booking without making a payment. The label for this option is set in the "Tour Book No Payment Label (External)" Custom Label.
CustomField.label: Allow external book with no payment
